## Statistical Highlights

```{python}
stats_ctx = context.get("stats", {})
if not stats_ctx:
    emit_markdown("> TODO: Populate 'stats' in the context file to surface multivariate analyses.")
else:
    def render_plot_block(title, block):
        emit_markdown(f"### {title}")
        primary = block.get("primary_plot")
        if primary and any(primary.lower().endswith(ext) for ext in (".png", ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".svg")):
            caption = block.get("caption", title)
            emit_markdown(f"![{caption}]({primary})")
        elif primary:
            emit_markdown(f"- {block.get('caption', 'Primary plot')}: {link_label(primary, block.get('caption', 'Primary plot'))}")
        extras = block.get("extra_plots", [])
        for extra in extras:
            path = extra.get("path")
            if not path:
                continue
            caption = extra.get("caption", path)
            if any(path.lower().endswith(ext) for ext in (".png", ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".svg")):
                emit_markdown(f"![{caption}]({path})")
            else:
                emit_markdown(f"- {link_label(path, caption)}")
        tables = block.get("tables", [])
        table_lines = []
        for table in tables:
            label = table.get("label", table.get("path", "Table"))
            path = table.get("path")
            if path:
                table_lines.append(f"- {label}: {link_label(path, label)}")
        if table_lines:
            emit_markdown("\n".join(table_lines))
        if block.get("notes"):
            emit_markdown(f"> {block['notes']}")

    if stats_ctx.get("pca"):
        render_plot_block("Principal Component Analysis", stats_ctx["pca"])
    if stats_ctx.get("plsda"):
        render_plot_block("PLS-DA", stats_ctx["plsda"])
    for volcano in stats_ctx.get("volcano_plots", []):
        title = volcano.get("title", "Volcano Plot")
        render_plot_block(title, volcano)
    summary_tables = stats_ctx.get("summary_tables", [])
    if summary_tables:
        emit_markdown("### Summary Tables")
        for table in summary_tables:
            label = table.get("label", table.get("path", "Table"))
            path = table.get("path")
            if path:
                emit_markdown(f"- {label}: {link_label(path, label)}")
```
